app.title: FuelTrack
app.fillProfile: Start by filling in your profile

tips.highCarbs: High on carbs today — ease up on bread, rice, pasta
tips.highFat: High on fat today — go lighter on oils and cheese
tips.lowProtein: Low on protein — add chicken, fish or Greek yogurt
tips.noExerciseWeek: No movement this week — even a 20 min walk counts
tips.onTrack: You're on track — keep it up
tips.streakWeek: Full week logged ({{days}} days) — nice work ✨
tips.eveningUnderfed: Still short on food for the day — have a proper dinner
tips.fastingEatNow: Eating window is open — don't forget to fuel up
tips.hydration: Stay hydrated — aim for 2 L of water today 💧
tips.weekLowProtein: Low on protein most of the week — prioritise chicken, fish, eggs
tips.weekendOvershoot: Weekends are running hot — keep Sat/Sun closer to your target
tips.loseOverTarget: Over target — a tighter dinner keeps weight loss on track
tips.gainUnderTarget: Gaining means eating — add a snack or boost dinner portions
tips.weighIn: No weight logged in {{days}} days — update to keep targets accurate
tips.allergyReminder: Heads up — check labels for your marked allergens
tips.simpleModeHint: Simple mode is on — batch-cook 2-3 meals for the week
tips.beginnerCook: Cooking beginner? Try no-cook meals: yogurt, salads, sandwiches
tips.quickCookingHint: Short on time — stock pre-cooked proteins for quick assembly
tips.mealsLeft: {{count}} more meal(s) to hit your daily target
tips.limitationAware: Mind your noted limitation — pick low-impact options today
tips.homeNoEquipment: No equipment at home? Try push-ups, squats, planks, lunges
tips.beginnerFitness: Start with a 20-minute session — consistency beats intensity
tips.workoutsLeft: {{done}}/{{target}} workouts done this week — one more session counts
tips.sessionDurationHint: You planned {{mins}} min sessions — even one today keeps momentum
tips.suggestBeginnerQuick: Keep it simple — a quick no-cook option
tips.suggestBeginner: Easy pick today — no-cook or minimal prep
tips.suggestVeggies: Go for a veggie-heavy plate today
tips.suggestDairy: Add a dairy source somewhere today
tips.suggestBalanced: Aim for a balanced plate today
tips.suggestOutdoor: Outdoor cardio or a brisk walk
tips.suggestUserCooking: Stick with {{method}} — your preferred cooking style
tips.suggestSetFoodPrefs: Set food preferences in Profile to get tailored ideas

profile.content:
What it shows
Basic info
weight / height / age / gender
goal (lose / maintain / gain)
activity level
diet mode
→ used in every calculation
Your Target
kg you want to lose/gain
timeframe (weeks)
→ sets your daily deficit / surplus
Analysis
TDEE (maintenance)
Daily target kcal
Daily deficit / surplus
Protein target (g)
Macro split (%)
→ these are the "numbers" that drive the whole app

Food Profile
Food picks (proteins, carbs, dairy etc.)
→ shape meal plans & suggestions
Cooking style
(grilled, oven, fried etc.)
Cooking skill & time
→ controls how "complex" meals will be
Meals per day
→ structures the meal plan (e.g. 3 meals + snacks)
Allergies / intolerances
→ excluded from suggestions (critical)
Simple groceries
→ reuse meals → shorter shopping list

Exercise Profile
Fitness level
Where you work out
(home / gym / outdoor)
Equipment available
→ filters exercises
Workout frequency & duration
→ training plan structure
Fitness goals
(strength, weight loss, etc.)
Limitations / injuries
→ unsuitable exercises avoided

Account
Language (EN/GR)
Subscription / plan
Sign out

What you can do
Set a goal (kg + time)
See exactly how many calories you need
Adjust diet & macros
Define what you eat → better meal plans
Define your training setup → proper workouts

💡 Tips
Analysis is the core — if it's wrong, everything else will be off
Realistic rate: ~0.5–1 kg/week
Activity level greatly impacts TDEE → set it correctly
Allergies = must (blocks wrong suggestions)
The more complete the profile → the more accurate the Coach

summary.content:
What it shows
Remaining (calories) = Target − Food + Exercise
Shows how much you can still eat. Goes negative when you exceed the target.
Calories donut (circle)
Visual day progress. Fills as you eat. As you approach the target → intensity/color shifts.
Macro distribution (pie)
Protein / Carbs / Fat
→ shows how your intake is split relative to the target.
Macro bars
Exact amount (g) vs target for each macro.
Auto tips (👉 Tips)
Generated live from:
macros imbalance
calories
time of day
streak
Update as you log.
Streak 🔥
Consecutive days of logging.
If you miss a day → reset.
Coach
Quick actions: Meal Plan, Training Plan, Weekly Review
Custom questions
Whatever is generated is saved here
Saved Plans (Meal / Grocery / Training)
Expand / Collapse
Export PDF
Delete
Weight tracking
Log weight by date
30-day trend
Automatically affects calorie targets
History (past days)
Remaining / Food / Exercise
Expand for macros
📅 Date picker
Log a past day
Future disabled

What you can do
Check at a glance whether you're within your calorie target
See if your macros are properly distributed
Get live guidance from the tips
Create meal / training plans
Track weight progress & consistency
Log or edit past days

💡 Tips
If Remaining drops very low/negative → reduce intake or add exercise
If macros are off → fix the next meal, not the whole day
Streak = consistency metric, not performance
Weight: update 1–2 times/week for accurate targeting
Use the Weekly Review for a quick weekly check

food.content:
What it shows
Food of the Day
Everything you've eaten today, grouped by meal (Breakfast / Lunch / Snack etc.) + total calories.
Entries list
Each food with kcal + macros.
✏️ edit → change quantity/meal
❌ delete → remove

Add food
Search
Food database (GR + EN).
Filters:
High Protein
Low Carb
Low Cal
Keto
📸 Photo
AI food recognition → estimates kcal/macros
(approximate, not always exact)
🔲 Barcode
Scan a packaged product → instant add
(real device only)
Before Add
set grams / portion
pick meal
preview macros

Speed sections
Favorites ⭐
One-tap add for foods you eat often
Recent
Quick re-add from recent
Custom food
Create your own entry (per 100g):
kcal / protein / carbs / fat
Useful for:
home-cooked meals
repeated meals

What you can do
Fast daily logging
Edit quantities / meals
Reuse foods without search
Add via photo / barcode
Create custom entries

💡 Tips
Always check grams before adding (accuracy issue #1)
Use favorites for speed
Photo → cleaner image, one plate at a time works best
Custom → set it up once, then it's 1-click

exercise.content:
What it shows
Exercise today (total kcal)
Total calories burned + the day's exercise list
Entries list
Each exercise with:
duration (minutes)
kcal burned
❌ delete → remove entry

Add exercise
Search
Find an exercise from the library
Categories
Cardio
Gym
Training
Sports
Exercise dropdown
Shows kcal/min for each exercise
→ basis for the calorie calculation
Before Add
set minutes
preview kcal

Integrations
Health / Google Fit
Auto-import workouts (when connected)

Speed sections
Favorites ⭐
One-tap add (default duration ~30min)
Recent
Quick re-add from recent workouts
Custom exercise
Create your own exercise:
name
minutes
kcal/min
Useful for:
activities outside the library

What you can do
Log workouts and duration
See how many calories you're burning
Directly affect your remaining calories
Use favorites/recent for speed
Add custom activities

💡 Tips
Longer duration = more kcal (linear with kcal/min)
Exercise kcal add back to your daily allowance
Favorites = fastest logging for repeated workouts
Custom → set a realistic kcal/min for accurate results

welcome.heroSub: Tell me your goal and I'll take it from here — what to eat, what exercise to do, how to get where you want.
welcome.goalFirstDesc: Pick a goal — weight loss, muscle gain or maintenance — and the app auto-adjusts calories, macros and suggestions.
welcome.aiCoachDesc: Ask the coach what to eat now, what workout to do, or request a full meal plan for the day — based on your preferences.
welcome.greekFoodsDesc: Souvlaki, feta, Greek salad, toast — no cups and ounces. Enter "2 medium eggs" and we calculate automatically.
welcome.trackingDesc: By logging your meals and workouts, you see in real time if you're on target. That's what makes the difference.
welcome.fastDesc: Instant search, portions in 1 tap, barcode scanner and photo analysis. No unnecessary clicks.
welcome.formula: Our logic is simple — in calories (kcal):
welcome.formulaHint: Stay within your calorie target and results will follow.

summary.title: Daily summary
summary.plansDisclaimer: General suggestions — not a substitute for a specialist. Consult a doctor if you have conditions or allergies.
summary.noMealPlan: You don't have a meal plan yet. Ask the Coach!
summary.noTrainingPlan: You don't have a training plan yet. Ask the Coach!
summary.groceryReady: Tap "List" to generate a grocery list from your meal plan.
summary.groceryNeedPlan: Ask the Coach for a weekly meal plan first.

food.noFavoritesHint: Search for a food above and tap ☆ to add it. The Coach will use your favorites for more targeted suggestions!
food.name: Name

exercise.noFavoritesHint: Select an exercise from the dropdown and tap ☆ to add it. The Coach will suggest exercises from your favorites!

profile.title: Profile
profile.fillProfileDesc: Enter your basic info so we can calculate your daily calorie target.
profile.autoAdjust: The app automatically adjusts your calories
profile.unrealisticGoal: Unrealistic goal. Try more weeks or a smaller target.
profile.exerciseSuggestion: To reach your goal, add ~{{calories}} kcal/day of exercise ({{example}}).
profile.loginHint: Sign in to back up your data and unlock Pro features

nativeStale.title: App update required
nativeStale.body: Your installed app is missing native components ({{plugins}}). Some features will not work until you reinstall FuelTrack from fueltrack.me.

googleFit.title: Google Fit

aiCoach.title: Coach
aiCoach.subtitle: Nutritionist & Personal Trainer
aiCoach.proDesc: The Coach is available with a Pro account. Upgrade to get personalized nutrition and training advice.
aiCoach.freeNote: Free accounts include limited Coach requests. Upgrade to Pro for full access.
aiCoach.needsAccountDesc: Sign up to use the Coach — it's free!
aiCoach.limitDesc: You've used all {{limit}} Coach requests for today. Try again tomorrow!
aiCoach.monthlyLimitDesc: You've reached the monthly limit of {{limit}} queries. Resets next month.
aiCoach.lifetimeLimitDesc: You've used all {{limit}} free Coach requests. Upgrade to Pro for continued access.
aiCoach.paidLimitDesc: You've used all {{limit}} Coach requests for this month. Resets next month.
aiCoach.paidLimitExtra: Need more? You can add an extra 500 requests/month for just €2.99.
aiCoach.upgradeHint: Upgrade to Pro (€2.99/month) for 500 Coach requests per month!
aiCoach.prefsHintDesc: For tailored suggestions, go to the Profile tab and fill in your food preferences, fitness profile, and personal details.
aiCoach.askAnything: Ask me anything or tap for a quick analysis:
aiCoach.q3: How am I doing this week?

modeDescriptions.mediterranean: Mediterranean diet — olive oil, fish, vegetables
modeDescriptions.keto: Ketogenic — very low carbs, high fat
modeDescriptions.vegetarian: No meat — with eggs and dairy

planChooser.title: Welcome to FuelTrack!
planChooser.subtitle: Choose your plan to get started

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all related data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.item1: All profile data, food logs, and saved plans
deleteAccount.item3: Subscription is NOT cancelled automatically — manage it first if active
deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

auth.subtitle: Plan → Track → Achieve!
auth.name: Your name
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.postConfirmSignup: Email verified successfully! Please sign in with your password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.intro: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account and start using FuelTrack.
verifyEmail.spamHint: No email yet? Check your spam / promotions folder. Delivery usually takes less than a minute.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Email sent again. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendError: Could not resend email. Try again in a bit.
verifyEmail.notYetError: Your email is not verified yet. Click the link we sent you first.

foodPrefs.simpleGroceriesDesc: Repeats meals during the week so the grocery list stays relatively short
